_comment: School supply lists. Each kid points to a grade; the grade lists live once under 'grades' so two kids in the same grade share them. Edit the grade lists or move a kid to a new grade each year. The combined shopping list at the bottom of the page is built automatically from every kid's required items.
note: Every student also brings a backpack, a water bottle with a secure lid, and PE shoes.
allStudents: Water bottle with a secure lid
artFeeNote: $5 art fee per student, collected to restock art supplies as needed.

required: 36 #2 pencils or mechanical pencils with lead
1 pkg of fine tip dry erase markers
Headphones or earbuds (wired only, no Bluetooth)
